name: Redline Vanguard
oracle_text:
Vigilance
Alt-Mode (Turbo Mode) — {1}: Until your next turn, ~'s base power and toughness become 3/1 and it gains haste. Activate only as a sorcery.
flavor_text: Efficiency in the defense, momentum in the strike.
design_notes: This card is the signpost uncommon for the WR (Rapid Strike) archetype. It embodies the 'tactical shift' of the Alt-Mode mechanic by offering a choice between stability and explosive speed. The base form uses White's defensive philosophy (Vigilance, 1/2 body) to allow for safe play and blocking, while the Alt-Mode utilizes Red's aggressive nature (Haste, 3/1 body) to facilitate sudden combat spikes. At CMC 2, it is an efficient early-game unit that can be upgraded into a tempo threat mid-game.
